title: cyclophorus sheareri
intro: Cyclophorus sheareri, also known as the Shearer's cyclophorus, is a species of air-breathing land snail, belonging to the family Cyclophoridae. Traditionally, the mucus of the Cyclophorus sheareri has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this snail's mucus include potential applications in wound healing, skin care, and the treatment of certain infections. Herbal preparations of Cyclophorus sheareri typically involve the extraction of its mucus, which can be used in creams, ointments, or other topical applications for its therapeutic effects.
